reviews.review_description: Would pay to see the whole story even if I had to pay for each episode

This very short title is a promo for the homonymous comic book. The audiovisuals are great, but this is a very linear presentation. I would gladly pay for a similar experience (such as an adventure game) if there was more to see and do. Run just fine on a Note 4, but sometimes the arrows to advance would show up only after gazing where they should appear (so if you get stuck, keep moving your gaze).
I would love to see more story telling apps done like this, feels very alive.

reviews.review_title: Cool idea but way to short
reviews.review_description: Would of been worth it if there was a whole comic even paid this way. I’d spend a buck or two on a issue. But this very short experince is very short and too much of a teaser even for a free one
